name: ledger
description: Monty-Ledger personal knowledge vault — query notes, search content, build context packets, manage profiles and pods. Backed by PostgreSQL with pg_trgm full-text search.

secrets_required.description: PostgreSQL connection string for the Monty-Ledger database, e.g. postgresql://user:pass@localhost:5432/monty_ledger

notes: Requires a running PostgreSQL instance with pg_trgm extension enabled.
The notes table must exist with columns: path, title, type, tags, access, confidence, role_mode, content, truth_layer, status, created_at.
Run the Monty-Ledger bootstrap script to initialize the database schema before first use.
